question: Does the image depict a centered data table on a white square canvas, occupying approximately 85% of the canvas width and 70% of the canvas height?
Does the table consist of exactly 9 rows and 7 columns, drawn with thin black lines?
Does the top-left corner cell contain a diagonal header with 'ROW' written in the bottom-left and 'COL' in the top-right?
In Row 1 (Group Header), are columns 2–4 merged into a single cell labeled 'G1', and columns 5–7 merged into a single cell labeled 'G2'?
In Row 2 (Sub-header), is column 1 blank, and do columns 2–7 display the labels 'C1', 'C2', 'C3', 'C4', 'C5', and 'C6' respectively?
In the first column of rows 3–9, are the row headers 'R1' through 'R7' displayed vertically?
In row R3, are the data cells corresponding to columns C2 and C3 merged into a single cell?
In row R5, are the data cells corresponding to columns C4, C5, and C6 merged into a single cell?
In row R7, are the data cells corresponding to columns C1 and C2 merged into a single cell?
Does every data cell (including merged ones) contain a mini horizontal bar filling from left to right?
In row R1, do the bars in columns C1–C6 correspond to the sequence: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%, 60%?
In row R2, do the bars in columns C1–C6 correspond to the sequence: 100%, 80%, 60%, 40%, 20%, 40%?
In row R3, do the bars follow the sequence: C1=40%, Merged Cell(C2-C3)=80%, C4=60%, C5=40%, C6=20%?
In row R4, do all six bars (C1–C6) appear to be of equal length, representing 60%?
In row R5, do the bars follow the sequence: C1=20%, C2=40%, C3=60%, Merged Cell(C4-C6)=100%?
In row R6, do the bars in columns C1–C6 correspond to the sequence: 80%, 60%, 40%, 20%, 40%, 60%?
In row R7, do the bars follow the sequence: Merged Cell(C1-C2)=100%, C3=80%, C4=60%, C5=40%, C6=20%?
Is there a legend centered below the table consisting of 5 small bars increasing from 20% to 100%, labeled exactly '20 40 60 80 100'?
Is the image monochromatic (using only black, white, and gray) and using a sans-serif font?
Does all text in the image use only Latin letters and numbers (no gibberish, non-Latin symbols, or garbled characters)?
Are the table lines straight, continuous, and properly aligned without obvious breaks or distortion?
Are all text labels and data bars clearly legible and free from visual artifacts?
